case_title: NEWTON HARBAND TRUST, MARTIN E. HARBAND TRUSTEE VS. DANIELLE SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BUISSON, DANIELLE (SUED AS DANIELLE SMITH A.K.A. DANIELLE BOISSON) ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWTON HARBAND TRUST, MARTIN E. HARBAND TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUISSON, DANIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1831 POLK STREET, #101 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $829.56 RENT, $441.15 COSTS, $27.65 DAMAGES PER DAY FROM 7/1/07 THROUGH 10/11/07, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,298.36, STAYED UNTIL NOV-11-2007, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Ernest Halperin, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Martin E. Harband, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Newton Harband Trust, Martin E. Harband Trustee.
Arnold Walter Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Danielle Buisson (sued as Danielle Smith) is present.
Melvin Caesar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of September 17, 2007 remains set.
